results.title: Belgium stage stunning comeback to sink Senegal in extra time
results.description: Senegal's Lamine Camara slid in on Tielemans as the ball flashed across the face of goal and conceded the spot-kick after a video assistant referee review, with the Belgian picking out the top corner to complete an extraordinary comeback

results.title: Experts release new Round of 32 predictions with Lamine Yamal, Spain heavily favored over Austria
results.description: Will Lamine Yamal and Spain roll through the Round of 32, or can Austria pull off a shocker at SoFi Stadium? Get expert predictions, score matrices, and live Polymarket odds.

results.title: Jaylen Brown now faces awkward meeting with new teammate he savagely insulted
results.description: Jaylen Brown is heading to the Philadelphia 76ers after years of publicly criticizing Joel Embiid and will now join the former NBA MVP in exchange for another player he critiqued, Paul George

results.title: Kane double fires England to comeback win over DR Congo at World Cup 2026
results.description: Harry Kane rescued England from a seismic World Cup shock with two late goals to beat the Democratic Republic of Congo 2-1 in Atlanta and secure a place in the last 16. Aiming to end a 60-year wait to win a major tournament, Thomas Tuchel’s men escaped humiliation and one of England’s worst-ever World Cup [...]

results.title: Denver fans cheer on Team USA in World Cup
results.description: Denver fans gathered Wednesday in Skyline Park to cheer on Team USA in the World Cup.

results.title: Memorial Drag Ball Game packs Vic West diamond with players and spectators for PRIDE event
results.description: Among the celebrations across Greater Victoria on July 1, players, spectators and picnic goers packed Vic West Park for the annual Memorial Drag Ball Game, one of Victoria PRIDE's signature events. The post Memorial Drag Ball Game packs Vic West diamond with players and spectators for PRIDE event appeared first on CHEK .
